publishedAbstract: - `Loki Compactor` pod in CrashLoopBackOff state and restarting all the time: ~~~ $ oc get pods-n openshift-logging-l app.kubernetes.io/component=compactor NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE logging-loki-compactor-0 0/1 Running 203 16h ~~~- Logs of the `Compactor` pods continuously refers to getting ping from `unexpected node`: ~~~ $ oc logs logging-loki-compactor-0-n openshift-logging.... 2024-02-01T08:29:21.812718174Z ts=2024-02-01T08:29:21.767881167Z caller=memberlist_logger.go:74 level=warn msg="Got ping for unexpected node 'logging-loki-compactor-0-abc123ab' from=10.0.0.0:7946" 2024-02-01T08:29:23.812169457Z ts=2024-02-01T08:29:23.771769792Z caller=memberlist_logger.go:74 level=warn msg="Got ping for unexpected node 'logging-loki-compactor-0-abc123ab' from=10.0.0.1:7946" 2024-02-01T08:29:23.812169457Z ts=2024-02-01T08:29:23.771871706Z caller=memberlist_logger.go:74 level=warn msg="Got ping for unexpected node 'logging-loki-compactor-0-abc123ab' from=10.0.0.2:7946" 2024-02-01T08:29:23.812169457Z ts=2024-02-01T08:29:23.774916117Z caller=memberlist_logger.go:74 level=warn msg="Got ping for unexpected node 'logging-loki-compactor-0-abc123ab' from=10.0.0.2:7946".... ~~~
publishedTitle: Loki Compactor pod in CrashLoopBackOff in RHOCP4
